name: Syed Mahbubur Rahman
bio: Over 25 years of reshaping institutional real estate portfolios across Bangladesh.
fullBio: Syed Mahbubur Rahman is a veteran in the Bangladeshi real estate market. With an illustrious career spanning over two decades, he has been instrumental in the development of major commercial hubs in Gulshan and Motijheel. Before founding Sabit Asset Management, he served as the Managing Director of one of the leading property development firms in South Asia.

experience.title: Managing Director
experience.description: Led the acquisition and development of premium commercial spaces in Gulshan.

education.school: Institute of Business Administration (IBA), Dhaka University

awards: Real Estate Personality of the Year 2019 (Bangladesh Property Awards)

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: Specialist in identifying high-yield prime market opportunities in Dhaka and Chattogram.
fullBio: Nusrat Jahan leads the acquisitions team with a sharp focus on commercial and mixed-use properties in Bangladesh's fastest-growing economic zones. Her analytical approach has resulted in a 40% increase in portfolio valuation over the past 3 years.

experience.title: Director of Investments
experience.description: Managed an investment fund of over BDT 500 Crore focused on the real estate sector.

name: Kazi Tariqul Islam
bio: Maximizing NOI through sustainable asset improvements in prime commercial buildings.
fullBio: With a strong background in structural engineering and property management, Kazi Tariqul Islam focuses on modernizing existing assets in Motijheel and Banani to increase their commercial yield and environmental sustainability.

experience.title: Head of Operations
experience.description: Oversaw the facility management of 12 commercial towers across Dhaka.
